title: Suo motu case against top Karnataka officials after Lokayukta raids expose illegal sand mining in Bagalkot
description: Director of Mines and Geology Department in Bengaluru, Deputy Director of Mines and Geology in Bagalkot, the Bagalkot Deputy Commissioner, and tahsildars of Badami, Mudhol, Jamakhandi, Hunagund and Ilkal taluks are among those named in case
